retrieved_result: When Do I Start My Income Tax Year? When Do I Start My Income Tax Year? Every business is required to file and pay taxes in accordance to an annual accounting period called a tax year. Whether it's calendar year or fiscal year, the business must be consistent once it chooses a method. Tax years are typically 12 consecutive months; but
